name: Privia Health Group, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Privia Health Group, Inc. (Privia Health, we, our, or the Company) is a technology-driven, national physician-enablement company that collaborates with physician practices, health plans, and health systems to achieve the quadruple aim of better outcomes, lower costs, improved patient experience, and happier and more engaged providers. We seek to accomplish the quadruple aim by entering markets and organizing existing physicians and non-physician clinicians into a unique practice ...
